releaseNotes:
• Fix (critical): a large Xtream source (270k channels) no longer collapses to a tiny number of rows on import. The channel database was keyed on the display name, so channels sharing a name overwrote each other. It is now keyed on the provider stable ID so every distinct stream is stored correctly.
• Improvement: source import is significantly faster. Channel rows are now written in batches instead of one at a time, reducing the database write phase from several minutes to well under a minute.
• Improvement: the import progress bar now shows real percentage, channel count, and a time estimate during the database write phase.
• Fix: the settings backup filename now shows the correct timestamp on the phone save dialog.
